The median factor is 0.897.

Converting 14.69:
14.69 * 0.897:
14.69 * 0.007 = 0.10283
14.69 * 0.090 = 1.32210
14.69 * 0.800 = 11.75200
0.10283 + 1.32210 = 1.42493
1.42493 + 11.75200 = 13.17693
= 13.176

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{13.176}
